examples: The plates and glassware were rimmed with gold.
The whole lake was rimmed with thick beds of reeds.
She is very old now, with little, round, wire-rimmed glasses and whiskers sprouting from her chin.
Heeringa is described as 5-foot-1, 110 pounds with blond hair, blue eyes and wearing wire-rimmed glasses.
Eyes rimmed in black and lashes painted, standing stiffer than the prongs of a fork.
